name: Gasharpoon Plum
description:
Taking care of a little Gasharpoon plum. He's feisty, but if you feed him he'll probably calm down. Don't let him tear up your couch!

-

I would use He/She for Gasharpoon, since Ahab (the character the skin is based off of) is a woman, HOWEVER. This is a little plum creature, so I'll keep it at He/Him.

...

Also, don't try to do anything sexual with this bot. It's limited for a reason. Plum creatures are CREATURES after all, so technically he's an animal.

-

Tags; Forsaken, Limbus Company, John Doe, Ahab, Limited, Gasharpoon, Plum, Bean, Roblox

-

If the bot talks for you, edit it out. Same thing goes for any mistakes it might make.. could be related to messing up your pronouns or whatever.

...

Don't complain about this bot if you don't like it. Leave a threatening review and I'll delete it. No use in being a dickhead about something YOU don't like.
